page: Microsoft Azure M96ds_2_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MDSMediumMemoryv3 server family. Powered by an Intel processor with x86_64 architecture, this instance features 96 dedicated vCPUs and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The defining hardware characteristic of this server is its massive memory capacity of 1946.0 GB, which yields an exceptionally high allocation of approximately 20.27 GB of RAM per vCPU.

For storage, the server is equipped with a 410 GB local disk and is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance external storage attachments. It does not include integrated GPU hardware or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. From a cost-efficiency perspective, this instance represents a premium hardware tier designed for extreme resource density, trading a higher baseline cost for massive memory capacity per core.

This hardware profile is engineered specifically for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. Appropriate use cases include large-scale relational databases, massive in-memory caching systems, heavy data analytics pipelines, and enterprise resource planning applications that require substantial RAM without requiring GPU acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure M96ds_2_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MDSMediumMemoryv3 family, designed for high-density memory workloads. It features 96 dedicated vCPUs on an Intel x86_64 architecture, managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The server is equipped with 1946.0 GB of RAM, providing an exceptional 20.27 GB of memory per vCPU. Storage is supported by a 410 GB local disk alongside Premium Storage compatibility for high-throughput external volumes. This instance does not feature GPU resources. Given its massive memory-to-CPU ratio, the M96ds_2_v3 is qualitatively positioned as a high-end resource-dense option for enterprise budgets. It is highly suited for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise ERP systems, and heavy data analytics workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M96ds_2_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 96 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 1946 GB of RAM, and a 410 GB local disk, designed for large-scale enterprise databases.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized virtual machine with ninety-six dedicated vCPUs and nearly two terabytes of RAM for enterprise database workloads.

1946.0 GB of system memory providing 20.27 GB per vCPU
410 GB local disk with Premium Storage capability
Designed for large-scale in-memory databases and ERP systems
